items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Witness signature option' as part of the liability waiver process. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm the presence or functionality of this requirement. As such, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
